mapper.sql: SELECT TB_CONTRACTID , CONTRACT_TYPE_CD , FN_GET_CODE_NM('CONTRACT_TYPE', CONTRACT_TYPE_CD) AS CONTRACT_TYPE_CD_NM , CONTRACT_NO , CONTRACT_NAME , VARCHAR_FORMAT(TO_DATE(CONTRACT_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD'), 'YYYY/MM/DD') AS CONTRACT_DATE , VARCHAR_FORMAT(AMOUNT, '999,999,999,999') AS AMOUNT , VARCHAR_FORMAT(TO_DATE(START_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD'), 'YYYY/MM/DD') AS START_DATE , VARCHAR_FORMAT(TO_DATE(END_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD'), 'YYYY/MM/DD') AS END_DATE , DEL_YN FROM TB_CONTRACT WHERE COALESCE(DEL_YN, 'N') = 'N'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_CONTRACT ( TB_CONTRACTID , CONTRACT_TYPE_CD , CONTRACT_NO , CONTRACT_NAME , CONTRACT_DATE , AMOUNT , START_DATE , END_DATE , REG_USER_ID , REG_DT ) VALUES ( NEXTVAL FOR TB_CONTRACTIDSEQ , #{CONTRACT_TYPE_CD} , #{CONTRACT_NO} , #{CONTRACT_NAME} , REPLACE(#{CONTRACT_DATE}, '/', '') , REPLACE(#{AMOUNT}, ',', '') , REPLACE(#{START_DATE}, '/', '') , REPLACE(#{END_DATE}, '/', '') , #{REG_USER_ID} , CURRENT TIMESTAMP )
